name: jiangyue-website-planner
description: Codex skill plugin for Jiangyue Technology website page planning, B2B messaging, content structure, and image request briefs.

interface.shortDescription: Plan Jiangyue B2B website pages and image briefs.
interface.longDescription: A Jiangyue Technology Codex skill for planning WordPress/Gutenberg page structure, B2B industrial messaging, CTA strategy, attention hierarchy, and handoff briefs for website images.
defaultPrompt: Use $jiangyue-website-planner to plan a Jiangyue website page before creating assets.
Use $jiangyue-website-planner to turn a rough page idea into a B2B page brief and image request brief.
Use $jiangyue-website-planner to revise a page plan after image production reveals a strategy or scope problem.
